description: A vertical memorial graphic built on a sepia-toned photograph of a uniformed Border Patrol agent standing in front of U.S. and other flags. Large white serif text reads Eric Cespedes, with italic text below stating that Supervisory Border Patrol Agent Eric Cespedes drowned while saving his children who were caught in a rip current off South Padre Island, Texas, and that he is survived by his wife, three children, mother, and four siblings.
notable_text: Eric Cespedes; Supervisory Border Patrol Agent Eric Cespedes drowned while saving his children, who were caught in a rip current off South Padre Island, Texas
